Interpretation & caveats
The GFN2-xTB method provides semi-empirical Fukui indices suitable for qualitative reactivity trends; absolute values carry the typical limitations of tight-binding charge models and single-conformer treatment.  The Fe center (atom 11) emerges as both the most electrophilic (highest f+) and most nucleophilic (highest f−) site in this ferrocene geometry.
